title: Adjust column width on "List View" widget
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: paulhirschi (Paul Hirschi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

After adding the “list view” widget to a dashboard you are unable to adjust the column width in the widget. Column width is adjustable in the connected boards but adjusting it on the connected board doesn’t affect the column width in the widget and the width in the widget itself isn’t adjustable. I have several columns of “text” that I would like to adjust the width to be able to see more rather than having to adjust the row height which makes the list appear awkward.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to adjust the column width to see more of a “text” column without having to adjust the height of the row.
